description: As the extraction window narrows, chaos erupts with gunfire and a split mission: Mack, Deke, and the rest of the team scramble to find Freddy and escape. Koenig tries to save Freddy from going down a dark path but is shot by Freddy, who insists on finishing his mission. Meanwhile, the Chronicoms realize their failure, and S.H.I.E.L.D. prepares to extract quickly to avoid being trapped in the past.

transcript.line: What are those things?
That's our future if we don't get you out of here alive.
Well, how are we supposed to do that? We don't have any weapons.
Speak for yourself.
Die, Coppers!
Mack.
What the... Are those the Martians?
Yes. Those are the Martians. Stay low.
Where's Freddy? Freddy! Koenig, Enoch, split up and find him.
3 and a half minutes.
Until what?
Till the Zephyr jumps to the future.
It's a Time Window. We learned about those in class today. Any ideas?
I quake, you run?
Just to be clear, this was a rescue mission, right?
Don't do it, son. You're better than this.
You need to go. Now.
You're a good kid, Freddy. But don't make the same choices your dad made.
Why do you think I'm doing this? I'm going to be somebody, not a coward like him.
Listen, listen. You and I... are gonna go get a drink, okay? And we'll talk about this.
Stop.
What? Are you gonna shoot me? Freddy, you're a lot of things, but you're not a...
You think you know me? You don't know me. You don't know nothin'.
You just stepped off a building, Freddy.
We failed. Hydra will rise. S.H.I.E.L.D. will form.
We can still eliminate those who are here.
Another time. The window is closing. We need to go.
They stopped firing.
It's a trick.
I don't think so. Coulson, get down.
They're gone.
We have two minutes.
Let's go!
Mack.
He shot me. Can you believe it? Not even a good shot. Nothing damaged except my faith in humanity.
I am afraid I do not know how to repair that. Where is Wilfred Malick?
Oh, he... he went with them.
Enoch, do you copy? We're running out of time. Did you find Freddy?
Affirmative. Wilfred Malick has made his delivery. He is alive, and the future is secure.
You need to get back to the ship now.
Get out of here, you ol' metalhead. I'll be fine. Yeah, marvelous.
